events.title: Brian May turns 79
events.blurb: Queen's legendary guitarist, Brian May, was born on July 19, 1947, in Hampton Hill, Middlesex.

angles.name: Guitar God
angles.copy: Seventy-nine years young and still a rock icon! We're celebrating the one and only Brian May today. What's your favourite Queen guitar solo?

events.title: Mick Jagger turns 83
events.blurb: The iconic frontman of The Rolling Stones, Sir Mick Jagger, was born on July 26, 1943, in Dartford, Kent.

angles.name: Rock 'n' Roll Legend
angles.copy: Eighty-three years of rock 'n' roll energy! Happy birthday to the legendary Mick Jagger. Still got those moves!

events.title: MTV launched in the US
events.blurb: Music Television (MTV) officially launched in the United States on August 1, 1981, with The Buggles' 'Video Killed The Radio Star' as its very first music video.

angles.name: Rewind to MTV's Start
angles.copy: Remember when music videos changed everything? Today marks the launch of MTV back in '81, kicking off with The Buggles' iconic track.

events.title: Oasis released 'Definitely Maybe'
events.blurb: Oasis's groundbreaking debut album, 'Definitely Maybe', was originally released on August 29, 1994, becoming a cornerstone of Britpop.

angles.name: Britpop Classic
angles.copy: Twenty-two years since Oasis dropped 'Definitely Maybe' and changed the game. What's your favourite track from this Britpop masterpiece?

events.title: Woodstock Festival began
events.blurb: The legendary Woodstock Music & Art Fair, a three-day festival of peace and music, took place from August 15-18, 1969, in Bethel, New York.

angles.name: Peace & Music
angles.copy: Fifty-seven years ago, a generation gathered for three days of peace, love, and music. Remembering the start of the iconic Woodstock Festival today.

events.title: Anniversary of Elvis Presley's death
events.blurb: Elvis Presley, the 'King of Rock and Roll', passed away on August 16, 1977, leaving behind an unparalleled musical legacy.

angles.name: Remembering The King
angles.copy: Forty-nine years today since we lost the King. Elvis Presley's music continues to define generations. What's your go-to Elvis track?

events.title: Tupac Shakur shot in Las Vegas
events.blurb: Rapper Tupac Shakur was fatally shot in a drive-by shooting in Las Vegas on September 7, 1996, and later died on September 13, 1996.

angles.name: Tupac's Legacy
angles.copy: Remembering the profound impact of Tupac Shakur on music and culture. His voice continues to resonate decades later.

events.title: Anniversary of Jimi Hendrix's death
events.blurb: Jimi Hendrix, widely regarded as one of the greatest guitarists in history, passed away on September 18, 1970, at the age of 27.

angles.name: Guitar Legend Tribute
angles.copy: Today, we pay tribute to the incomparable Jimi Hendrix, whose revolutionary guitar work changed music forever. What's your favourite Hendrix track?

events.title: The Beatles released 'Abbey Road'
events.blurb: The Beatles' eleventh studio album, 'Abbey Road', featuring its iconic zebra crossing cover, was released in the UK on September 26, 1969.

angles.name: Iconic Album
angles.copy: Fifty-seven years since The Beatles gave us 'Abbey Road'. That album cover is still one of the most famous in music history!

events.title: Chrissie Hynde turns 75
events.blurb: Chrissie Hynde, the distinctive voice and frontwoman of The Pretenders, was born on September 7, 1951, in Akron, Ohio.

angles.name: Pretenders Icon
angles.copy: Happy 75th birthday to the incredible Chrissie Hynde! A true rock trailblazer whose voice and attitude remain unmatched.

events.title: Liam Gallagher turns 54
events.blurb: The unmistakable voice of Oasis and a defining figure of Britpop, Liam Gallagher, was born on September 21, 1972, in Manchester.

angles.name: Rock 'n' Roll Star
angles.copy: Happy 54th birthday to the one and only Liam Gallagher! Still bringing that pure rock 'n' roll swagger.

events.title: John Lennon released 'Imagine'
events.blurb: John Lennon's powerful anthem 'Imagine' was released as a single in the UK on October 24, 1975, following its album release in 1971.

angles.name: Imagine Peace
angles.copy: Fifty-one years since John Lennon's 'Imagine' first inspired the world. Its message of peace and unity is as relevant today as ever.

events.title: Apple released the first iPod
events.blurb: Apple unveiled the original iPod on October 23, 2001, revolutionising portable music with '1,000 songs in your pocket'. It began shipping on November 10, 2001.

angles.name: Pocket Full of Tunes
angles.copy: Remember the game-changer? Twenty-five years ago, the first iPod arrived and put a thousand songs in our pockets. How many did you own?

events.title: James Bond Day
events.blurb: James Bond Day is celebrated annually on October 5th, marking the anniversary of the world premiere of the first Bond film, 'Dr. No', in 1962.

angles.name: Shaken, Not Stirred
angles.copy: Happy James Bond Day! Celebrating over six decades of 007, from iconic gadgets to unforgettable theme tunes. What's your favourite Bond film?

events.title: John Lennon would have been 86
events.blurb: Legendary singer-songwriter and co-founder of The Beatles, John Lennon, was born on October 9, 1940, in Liverpool.

angles.name: Lennon's Legacy
angles.copy: Remembering John Lennon on what would have been his 86th birthday. His music and message of peace continue to inspire millions worldwide.

events.title: John Cleese turns 87
events.blurb: The iconic British comedian, actor, and writer, known for Monty Python and Fawlty Towers, John Cleese, was born on October 27, 1939.

angles.name: Comedy Genius
angles.copy: Happy 87th birthday to the legendary John Cleese! From Monty Python to Fawlty Towers, his comedic genius is truly timeless.

events.title: The Beatles released 'The White Album'
events.blurb: The Beatles' ninth studio album, officially titled 'The Beatles' but commonly known as 'The White Album', was released on November 22, 1968.

angles.name: White Album Anniversary
angles.copy: Fifty-eight years since The Beatles unleashed 'The White Album'. A double LP packed with groundbreaking tracks. What's your favourite?
